$schema: Rize.gg Component Registry — maps every design system component to its code path, props, and Figma source.

Button.designNotes: Primary buttons use mint/teal bg (#99F9EA) with dark text. Always use rounded-[var(--radius-sm)] for sm/md, rounded-[var(--radius-md)] for lg.

SocialAuthButton.designNotes: Full-width dark surface button with icon + 'Continue with {provider}'. Used on auth pages.

FilterChip.designNotes: Pill-shaped. Active state: accent border + accent bg subtle + checkmark. Horizontal scrollable row.

Sidebar.designNotes: 240px expanded, 60px collapsed. Border-right. Sections: Main (Home/Games/Team finder), Competitive (Rize LFG/Scrims/Tournaments/Calendar), Social (Federations/Clubs/Players/Leaderboard/Missions). Footer: Discord/Settings/Help/Profile.

TopBar.designNotes: 56px height. Breadcrumb left, action icons right (messages, notifications, theme). Border-bottom.

Breadcrumbs.designNotes: ChevronRight separator. Last item is white text, others are secondary text with hover.

LandingNav.designNotes: Logo left, links center (Find a Team/Tournaments/Rize LFG/Scrims/Explore Games/Top Players), Sign Up button right. Backdrop blur.

usage: <SessionCard gameIcon={<Gamepad2 size={24} className="text-white" />} gameColor="#FF5252" teamName="Just4fun Squad" owner="TenZ" game="Valorant" slotsUsed={3} slotsTotal={5} time="Starting in 18:15" skillRequirement="Platinum" />

<SessionCard gameIcon={<Shield size={24} className="text-white" />} gameColor="#F59E0B" teamName="Pro Scrimmers" owner="Aspas" game="CS2" slotsUsed={4} slotsTotal={5} time="Starting in 02:30" skillRequirement="Diamond" />
SessionCard.designNotes: Gradient bg (accent 2%→8%) with accent border. 52px game icon square with gameColor bg. Team name 18px semibold + avatar. Owner in accent + game with dividers. Slots/availability/time with vertical dividers. Skill requirement badge. Two buttons: 'Session details' (outline) + 'Join now →' (primary #D7FEED bg).

countdown.type: { days: string; hours: string; minutes: string }

usage: <TournamentCard heroImage="/hero.jpg" title="Valorant Champions TOUR" prize="$30,000" status="Registration open" location="Saudi Arabia" capacity="08/10" rankRequirement="Gold +" countdown={{ days: '01', hours: '18', minutes: '03' }} organizerName="Fatima Saeed" />
TournamentCard.designNotes: 372px width. 166px hero image with prize badge (bg-status-warning backdrop-blur) + status pill (rounded-[88px]). Meta row: MapPin/Users/ChevronDown icons with vertical dividers. 56px game icon + title 18px semibold + description. Countdown: 3 segments bg-accent-subtle. Organizer: 32px avatar + name.

usage: <ClubCard name="ShadowCore" status="Recruiting" owner="TenZ" timezone="UTC/GMT +2" memberCount={2} memberMax={10} activeGames={[{ label: 'VAL' }, { label: 'CS2' }]} />
<ClubCard name="ShadowCore" owner="TenZ" timezone="UTC/GMT +2" memberCount={2} memberMax={10} activeGames={[{ label: 'VAL' }]} onOpen={() => {}} />
<ClubCard name="ShadowCore" status="Recruiting" owner="TenZ" memberCount={5} memberMax={10} activeGames={[{ label: 'VAL' }]} onDetails={() => {}} onJoin={() => {}} />
<ClubCard name="ShadowCore" owner="TenZ" memberCount={5} memberMax={10} activeGames={[{ label: 'VAL' }]} joined />
ClubCard.designNotes: Accent border + gradient bg. 52px rounded-[4px] avatar. Name 18px semibold + country flag + status pill (bg-[#161D22]). Owner in accent + timezone + member count with vertical dividers. Active Games section with 60x32px rounded-full game pills. Button variants: 'Open Club' (accent border), 'Club details' + 'Join Club →' (two-button), 'Joined' (disabled).

usage: <MissionCard icon={<Trophy />} title="Win 10 Matches" rank="Gold" progress={7} maxProgress={10} badgeRanks={[{ label: 'Bronze', active: true }, { label: 'Gold', active: true }, { label: 'Diamond', active: false }]} />
MissionCard.designNotes: Badge icon + title/description. Rank label + progress bar. Badge rank pills. Locked state dims card.

FederationCard.designNotes: 276x72px card. 52px rounded-[6px] flag area. Country name 16px semibold. Users icon + member count 14px. Optional badge pill.

usage: <PlayerCard avatar="/player.jpg" name="Aspas" country="Brazil" games={[{ bgColor: 'bg-status-error' }]} rating={4.8} totalRatings={120} isFriend />
PlayerCard.designNotes: 324px width, 20px padding. 56px avatar with ring. Name 24px semibold tracking-[-0.14px]. Country flag 20x14px. Main Games + Badges sections with dividers. Star rating in #FDDF49. Action buttons: Add friend (accent), Message, More.

usage: <StatCard title="Total sessions" value="1247" subtitle="3200 Hours" icon={<Gamepad2 size={24} />} />
<StatCard title="Login Streak" value="18" subtitle="Days" icon={<Flame size={24} />} />
<StatCard title="Available friends" value="6" subtitle="Online now" icon={<Users size={24} />} />
StatCard.designNotes: Gradient bg from d7feed 2% to 8%. Border d7feed/20. Title 16px medium in #d7feed. Icon 24px in #d7feed. Value 32px semibold in #e1e7ef. Subtitle 14px light text-secondary.

usage: <ArticleCard image="/hero.jpg" badge="Fresh Article" title="VCT 2025 Preview" date="Mar 4, 2025" />
ArticleCard.designNotes: Hero image with badge overlay. Title + description + date below.

GameTabCard.designNotes: Border-default, rounded-[8px], pl-7 pr-[26px] py-3. Gradient bg from accent 2% to 8%. Optional background image with dark overlay. 48px icon. Title 20px semibold tracking-[-0.1px]. Active: accent border.

TextInput.designNotes: Dark bg (#121415), subtle border, white text, gray placeholder. Error state: red border. Focus: accent border.

usage: <SearchInput placeholder="Search players..." value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)} onClear={() => setSearch('')} />
SearchInput.designNotes: Leading search icon. Clear X button when value exists.

usage: <Select label="Region" placeholder="Select region" options={[{ value: 'eu', label: 'Europe' }]} />
Select.designNotes: Dark bg + chevron. Same styling as TextInput.

Toggle.designNotes: Pill toggle. On: accent bg. Off: border-default bg. White thumb.

PasswordInput.designNotes: Lock icon left, eye/eye-off toggle right. Same base styling as TextInput.

ChatInput.designNotes: '+' attachment button left. Emoji + sticker icons right. Taller (48px) than regular inputs.

usage: <DataTable columns={[{ key: 'name', header: 'Name', sortable: true }]} data={players} />
DataTable.designNotes: Sortable columns with chevron icons. Hover row highlight. Border container.

usage: <LeaderboardRow rank={1} name="TenZ" countryFlag="🇨🇦" rankTier="Diamond" score={2450} maxScore={3000} />
LeaderboardRow.designNotes: Rank 1-3: trophy icon with gold/silver/bronze color + accent subtle bg. Rank 4+: number. Avatar + name + flag + stats.

StatusPill.designNotes: Rounded-full pill. Each variant has its own bg color. registration_open=green, live=red, finished=gray, playing=green, idle=yellow, recruiting=green.

Badge.designNotes: Rounded-full with border. Colored border + text + subtle bg per variant.

ProgressBar.designNotes: Accent-colored bar on surface bg. Label in accent color. Count in secondary color.

CountdownTimer.designNotes: 3 segments side-by-side. Each: accent-subtle bg + large number + unit label. Rounded-[var(--radius-md)].

usage: <ChatMessage username="TenZ" timestamp="12:18" message="Hey team, let's run some scrims tonight." />
<ChatMessage username="Aspas" roleBadge="Leader" timestamp="2:32 PM" message="I'm down!" replyTo={{ username: 'TenZ', text: 'Let's run some scrims' }} />
ChatMessage.designNotes: 58px avatar. 16px gap. Username 18px semibold white. Timestamp 12px secondary. Message 16px regular white leading-7. Reply: left border + truncated text. Hover: surface-hover/50.

usage: <ChatListItem name="Shadow Core" status="5 online" unreadCount={3} active />
ChatListItem.designNotes: Avatar + name + status. Unread badge (accent). Active: surface bg. Member count small text.

usage: <PageHeader title="Tournaments" subtitle="Find and join competitive tournaments" actions={<Button>Create</Button>} />
PageHeader.designNotes: Title (24px semibold) left. Actions right. Optional subtitle + timestamp.

SectionHeader.designNotes: Title left + action link right. Action link in accent color with underline on hover.

usage: <HeroBanner userName="Mehdyy98" tagline="Rift's calling.. Claim your victory." ctaLabel="Find your team" />
Ready to Squad up?} tagline="Join the competition" ctaLabel="Join now" />
HeroBanner.designNotes: Welcome back greeting + userName. Headline 40px bold with accent highlight. Tagline with optional game icon. CTA button bg-accent. Carousel dots. Optional character image on right. Gradient bg. Min height 384px.

sections.type: { title: string; items: { label: string; href?: string; active?: boolean }[] }[]

usage: <SettingsSidebar sections={[{ title: 'User Settings', items: [{ label: 'My Account', active: true }, { label: 'Profile' }] }]} />
SettingsSidebar.designNotes: 210px wide, border-r, pt-[68px]. Search input at top with border-[#343D3C]. Section titles: uppercase text-sm text-[#323A3E]. Active item: accent gradient bg + accent text. Default: text-text-secondary px-3.5 py-2.5. Default sections: USER SETTINGS + PLATFORM SETTINGS.

Modal.designNotes: Dark elevated bg. Blur backdrop. Title + close X header. Scrollable body. Footer buttons (Cancel ghost + Apply primary).

FilterDrawer.designNotes: Slides from right. Full height. Filter form content. Footer: Reset (ghost) + Apply (primary).

Avatar.designNotes: Sizes: xs=24px, sm=32px, md=40px, lg=58px, xl=80px, 2xl=120px. Fallback: surface bg with user icon. Online indicator: green dot bottom-right.

AvatarGroup.designNotes: Overlapping avatars (-space-x-2) with ring-2 ring-bg-primary. Overflow shows +N counter.

Divider.designNotes: Horizontal line in border-default. With label: line — text — line.

usage: <Tabs tabs={[{ label: 'About', value: 'about' }, { label: 'Articles', value: 'articles' }]} activeTab="about" onTabChange={setTab} />
Tabs.designNotes: Active tab: 3px accent bottom border + gradient bg from transparent to accent-subtle. Inactive: 1px border-default bottom. Full-width flex layout.

ViewToggle.designNotes: Two icon buttons side-by-side: List (table) and LayoutGrid (grid). Active: surface bg + primary text. Inactive: input bg + tertiary text.

GameIcon.designNotes: Circular game icon with colored background. Sizes: sm=24px, md=32px, lg=40px. GameIconGroup shows overlapping icons with +N overflow.

GameIconGroup.designNotes: Row of GameIcon components with overflow counter in accent color.

usage: <PlayerTableRow name="TenZ" sessions={234} groups={21} mutualGroups={3} country="Japan" rating={5.6} />
PlayerTableRow.designNotes: Horizontal row: avatar + name, sessions count, groups/mutual, game icons with overflow, country flag + name, star rating in yellow, action icons (add friend, message, more).

PlayerTableHeader.designNotes: Column headers for PlayerTableRow. Sessions and Groups columns are sortable.

GameCard.designNotes: 16:10 aspect ratio. Background image with gradient overlay. Game logo + name + session count at bottom. Hover: image scales 105%, border accent. Coming Soon badge top-right.

usage: <GameHeroBanner backgroundImage="/val-hero.jpg" gameName="Valorant" badges={[<Badge variant="accent" label="Supported" />, <Badge variant="accent" label="Active" />]} />
GameHeroBanner.designNotes: 240px height. Background image with diagonal gradient overlay. Game logo + name centered. Optional badges top-right.

usage: <GameStatCard title="Active Valorant sessions" value={54} ctaLabel="Browse sessions" variant="accent" />
GameStatCard.designNotes: Accent variant: gradient bg with accent border. 32px bold value. Optional subtitle inline. Optional CTA button full-width.

usage: <FederationHero backgroundImage="/gradient.jpg" federationName="São Paulo Federation" tagline="One Nation, One Game, One Victory." actions={<><Button>Become a member</Button><Button variant="outline">Set Up</Button></>} />
FederationHero.designNotes: 320px min-height. Background image with gradient overlay to bg-primary. Centered text with title, tagline, and action buttons.

usage: <QuickFacts facts={[{ label: 'Members', value: '1,250' }, { label: 'Founded', value: '2023' }]} contactInfo={[{ label: 'Email', value: 'info@federation.com' }]} />
QuickFacts.designNotes: Card with label-value pairs. Optional contact info section below a divider.

usage: <PricingCard title="Basic Membership" price="$11.90" features={['Access to tournaments', 'Community chat']} />
<PricingCard title="Premium Membership" price="$19.90" features={['All basic features', 'Priority matchmaking']} highlighted />
PricingCard.designNotes: Optional hero image top with gradient fade. Title + price (32px bold) + feature list with check icons + CTA button. Highlighted: accent border.

usage: <NewsCard authorName="Coach Eduardo" title="New Regulation Update" body="The federation has updated..." date="2 days ago" />
NewsCard.designNotes: Author avatar + name + label header. Bold title. Body text (3 line clamp). Optional image. Date + Read more footer.

Footer.designNotes: Top border. Centered tagline + CTA. Bottom bar: logo + copyright left, social icons right.

usage: <AccountConnectionCard icon={<DiscordIcon />} platform="Discord" description="Link your Discord account" />
AccountConnectionCard.designNotes: Icon in surface bg square + platform name + connection status. Connected: accent border, green check. Disconnect button: destructive. Connect button: outline with link icon.

SaveChangesBar.designNotes: Fixed bottom bar. Elevated bg with top border + shadow. 'You have unsaved changes' text + Reset (ghost) + Save (primary) buttons.
